title: exocarpos neocaledonicus
intro: Exocarpos neocaledonicus, also known as the New Caledonian woolly bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Santalaceae, native to the island of New Caledonia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Exocarpos neocaledonicus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiviral and antifungal properties, making it a potential treatment for skin conditions and infections. Exocarpos neocaledonicus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal benefits.
